headlines: Drift Protocol: $270–286M Solana DeFi hack shocks market (Apr 1–2, 2026)
Coinbase exec says U.S. CLARITY Act could clear key hurdle within days (Apr 1–2, 2026)
Stablecoin supply hits record ~$313–315B in Q1 2026 (reported early Apr 2026)
Crypto ETFs mixed on Apr 2: Bitcoin sees small inflows while Ethereum faces outflows (Apr 2, 2026)
XRP jumps ~12% after XRPL ecosystem updates and flows (Apr 2–3, 2026)

articles.title: Drift Protocol suffers huge Solana DeFi exploit — roughly $270–286M stolen
articles.summary: Drift, a major Solana-based perpetuals exchange, was hit by a fast vault-drain exploit on April 1–2, 2026. Attackers withdrew hundreds of millions in assets in minutes; teams paused withdrawals and on-chain sleuths traced large USDC flows. The attack is under forensic review and linked by some analysts to DPRK-style laundering patterns.

articles.title: Coinbase legal lead: CLARITY Act could clear last big hurdle within days
articles.summary: Coinbase’s chief legal officer said on April 1–2, 2026 that meaningful progress on the Senate CLARITY Act could happen within 24–48 hours, raising hopes the long‑running U.S. crypto market‑structure bill may advance toward a markup soon.

articles.title: Stablecoin supply tops roughly $313–315 billion after Q1 inflows
articles.summary: Stablecoins reached a new record supply near $313–315 billion in Q1 2026 as USDC continued to grow while USDT slipped slightly — a sign that dollar‑pegged liquidity is expanding even as market trading volumes ebb.

articles.title: ETF flows mixed on April 2: Bitcoin modest inflows, Ethereum heavy outflows
articles.summary: On April 2, 2026 spot Bitcoin ETFs posted modest net inflows while spot Ether ETFs recorded notable outflows — showing institutions remain selective and favor BTC over ETH in this risk‑off period.

articles.title: XRP rallies ~12% as XRPL adoption news and flows lift price
articles.summary: XRP rose about 10–12% across April 2–3, 2026 after reports of XRPL ecosystem growth and renewed institutional interest pushed volume and buying into the token.

articles.title: Bitget delists six small spot trading pairs (effective Apr 3, 2026)
articles.summary: Crypto exchange Bitget announced a planned delisting of six low‑volume spot pairs on April 3, 2026 as part of routine listing maintenance — users should close positions or move funds before the cutoff.

articles.title: Ethereum roadmap update: Fusaka rollout and the new twice‑year upgrade cadence
articles.summary: Ethereum’s recent Fusaka hard fork (rolled out late 2025) set a faster upgrade cadence and remains central to scaling plans; developers continue planning the next engineering upgrades to improve data availability and L2 cost reductions in 2026.

articles.title: On‑chain critics target Circle after stolen USDC moved post‑Drift hack
articles.summary: Following the Drift exploit, on‑chain researchers publicly criticized Circle for not freezing or flagging large USDC transfers fast enough as stolen funds moved across bridges — the debate raises fresh questions about stablecoin issuer freeze policies and cross‑chain controls.
